coverage_note: The bundled RET population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from RET RET receptor kinase signaling, neural-crest development, MAPK/PI3K activation, endocrine tumor biology, and fusion oncology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000165731: RET coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: RET findings should be read against RET receptor kinase signaling, neural-crest development, MAPK/PI3K activation, endocrine tumor biology, and fusion oncology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

RET MEN2 activating model is curated as a RET marker for MEN2 and medullary thyroid carcinoma review context, Hirschsprung disease developmental context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

RET fusion model is curated as a RET marker for MEN2 and medullary thyroid carcinoma review context, Hirschsprung disease developmental context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
